title: cassinia aculeata var. laevis
intro: Cassinia aculeata var. laevis, also known as the smooth stick-tongue, is a plant species native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been known to aid in wound healing and reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Cassinia aculeata var. laevis include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Cassinia aculeata var. laevis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal effects.
